/CAL: SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 2D/CTS: 2 /4019HALF/WS/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X: COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER RESTITUTION/

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/VD:DATE OF 09-16-19 IN DEPT 22/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE IN DEPT 23 ON 10-18-19/CONTD:JURY TRIAL ON 11-18-19 IN DEPARTMENT22/DOP/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RECALL/BWR: 03-29-19/BWR1/OR/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF OWN RECOGNIZANCE RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS ANKLEMONITOR/X: THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE SUBJECT TO DRUG TESTING AS PER THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/RX/WEAP/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF OWN RECOGNIZANCE RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE NO CONTACT WITH ANYONE IN THE SF COUNTY JAIL/CONTD: PROOF OF GPS MONITORING AND FURTHER PRE-TRIAL/DOP/
